node_kinds.name: SNOW_Account
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake account representing an organization's cloud data platform tenant

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Application
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake Native App installed in the account

node_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplicationRole
node_kinds.description: A role defined within a Snowflake Native App that controls access to application functionality

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Database
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake database that serves as a logical container for schemas and data objects

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Function
node_kinds.description: A user-defined or external function registered in a Snowflake schema

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Integration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object that connects to external services (API, security, storage, etc.)

node_kinds.name: SNOW_ApiIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for API connectivity

node_kinds.name: SNOW_CatalogIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for catalog connectivity

node_kinds.name: SNOW_ExternalAccessIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for outbound external access

node_kinds.name: SNOW_NotificationIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for notification delivery

node_kinds.name: SNOW_SecurityIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for identity and security integrations

node_kinds.name: SNOW_StorageIntegration
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake integration object for external storage access

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Procedure
node_kinds.description: A stored procedure registered in a Snowflake schema

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Role
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake role that groups privileges and can be assigned to users or other roles

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Schema
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake schema that organizes database objects within a database

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Stage
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake stage that references a location for data files used in loading and unloading

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Table
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake table that stores structured data

node_kinds.name: SNOW_User
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake user account that can authenticate and interact with the platform

node_kinds.name: SNOW_View
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake view that provides a virtual table based on a SQL query

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Warehouse
node_kinds.description: A Snowflake virtual warehouse that provides compute resources for queries and operations

node_kinds.name: SNOW_Base
node_kinds.description: Base kind applied to all SnowHound nodes as a secondary kind for source_kind metadata

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Contains
relationship_kinds.description: Structural containment relationship indicating the source object contains the target object within the Snowflake hierarchy

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Usage
relationship_kinds.description: Indicates the source principal has USAGE privilege on the target object, granting the ability to use or access it. For user-to-role edges, this represents role assignment.

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_RunAsRole
relationship_kinds.description: Indicates a security integration executes operations under the specified role

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyAggregationPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply aggregation policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyAuthenticationPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply authentication policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyBudget
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply budget controls to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyMaskingPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply data masking policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyPackagesPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply packages policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyPasswordPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply password policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyProtectionPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply protection policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplyRowAccessPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply row access policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ApplySessionPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to apply session policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_AttachPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to attach policies to the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Audit
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to audit operations on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_BindServiceEndpoint
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to bind service endpoints on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CancelQuery
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to cancel queries on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateAccount
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create accounts within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateApiIntegration
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create API integrations within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateApplication
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create applications within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateApplicationPackage
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create application packages within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateComputePool
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create compute pools within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateCredential
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create credentials within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateDataExchangeListing
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create data exchange listings within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateDatabase
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create databases within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateDatabaseRole
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create database roles within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateExternalVolume
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create external volumes within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateIntegration
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create integrations within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateNetworkPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create network policies within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateReplicationGroup
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create replication groups within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateRole
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create roles within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateSchema
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create schemas within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateShare
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create shares within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateUser
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create users within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_CreateWarehouse
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to create warehouses within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Delete
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to delete data from the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ExecuteDataMetricFunction
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to execute data metric functions on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ExecuteManagedAlert
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to execute managed alerts on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ExecuteTask
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to execute tasks on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ImportShare
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to import shares from the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Insert
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to insert data into the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ManageGrants
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to manage privilege grants on the target object, including granting and revoking privileges to other roles

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ManageWarehouses
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to manage warehouses within the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ManagementSharing
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to manage sharing configurations on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Modify
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to modify the target object's properties and configuration

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Monitor
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to monitor the target object's status and resource usage

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_MonitorExecution
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to monitor execution of operations on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Operate
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to operate (start, stop, suspend, resume) the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_OverrideShareRestrictions
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to override share restrictions on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Ownership
relationship_kinds.description: Indicates the source role owns the target object, granting full control including the ability to grant privileges to other roles

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_PurchaseDataExchangeListing
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to purchase data exchange listings on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Read
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to read data from the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Rebuild
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to rebuild the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ReferenceUsage
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to reference the target object in other objects

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_References
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to reference the target object's foreign keys and constraints

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Select
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to select (query) data from the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ServiceRead
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to read from services on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_ServiceWrite
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to write to services on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Truncate
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to truncate (remove all data from) the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Update
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to update data in the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_UseAnyRole
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to assume any role on the target object

relationship_kinds.name: SNOW_Write
relationship_kinds.description: Grants the ability to write data to the target object

## Steps to Remediate:

1. **Identify the affected resources**
2. **Remove or reduce excessive permissions**
3. **Verify the change**
